findings.line: Once or twice her head turned a fraction, not toward any sound Sylvanas could hear, but toward the pressure under the ground and in the air.
findings.reason: The filter phrase 'Sylvanas could hear' pads a direct sensory contrast the sentence can state without routing it through cognition.
findings.suggestedFix: Once or twice her head turned a fraction, not toward any sound, but toward the pressure under the ground and in the air.

findings.reason: The filter verb 'saw' explains a direct perception already carried by the preceding sentence.

findings.line: Sylvanas watched his gauntlet settle beside Stratholme's walls.
findings.reason: The filter verb 'watched' weakens a concrete visual beat that lands harder stated directly.
findings.suggestedFix: His gauntlet settled beside Stratholme's walls.

findings.reason: The fragment translates the woman's release of the stirrup into an abstract compliance caption the action already conveyed.
The sentence explains the silence after 'Nobody answered' instead of trusting the field chaos and unanswered question to carry the point.
Paragraph-final interpretive closure; the paragraph ends stronger on the aide vanishing in the crush.

findings.line: The first hard edges of a plan.
findings.reason: Paragraph-final summary sentence names the implication of the shouted lines instead of stopping on the plan fragments themselves.

audits.dominantPattern: P5/P6 sweep — geography and abstractions carrying agency

findings.line: Ahead, the road had dropped all trace of ordinary farm traffic.
findings.subject: the road
findings.realAgent: ordinary farm traffic had disappeared from this stretch
findings.reason: Dedicated P5 sweep: geography is given autonomous action instead of naming the changed traffic on it.
findings.suggestedFix: Ahead, ordinary farm traffic was gone from the road.

findings.line: The last rise gave Hearthglen to them whole.
findings.subject: The last rise
findings.realAgent: cresting the rise revealed the town
findings.reason: Dedicated P5 sweep: the landscape is made to perform a human gift/reveal action.
findings.suggestedFix: From the last rise, Hearthglen came into view whole.

findings.line: a town saving itself one body at a time
findings.subject: a town
findings.realAgent: priests, soldiers, and townsfolk doing triage and pyre work
findings.reason: The sentence launders human labor and desperation onto the abstraction 'town' instead of the people visibly doing the work.
findings.suggestedFix: priests and soldiers working one body at a time

findings.subject: The stillness
findings.realAgent: the corpse's slack body and wrong motion were signaling reanimation
findings.reason: Dedicated P5/P6 sweep: an abstract state is made to behave on its own instead of the prose naming the body's concrete wrongness.

findings.line: Then the dead remembered how many they were.
findings.subject: the dead
findings.realAgent: the line thinned and fresh bodies began rising in greater numbers again
findings.reason: Dedicated P5/P6 sweep: a nonhuman collective is given cognition and memory instead of the prose naming the field mechanics.
findings.suggestedFix: Then more of the dead started rising at once.

p5p6Sweep.notes: Dedicated second sweep caught geography/action smears at 'the road had dropped' and 'The last rise gave,' plus abstract/nonhuman cognition at 'The stillness had gone wrong' and 'Then the dead remembered how many they were.' Literal geography at 'the road to Stratholme ran between fields' survived.

findings.line: Narrowed by people who had been at it too long to waste anything.
findings.reason: Verdict-tag fragment appended to the prior sentence; it captions the motion from outside Sylvanas's body instead of staying in her direct scan.
findings.povMismatch: Sylvanas would clock the efficient movement itself, not pin a polished explanatory fragment over it.
findings.suggestedFix: People who had been at it too long wasted nothing.

findings.line: The first thing he saw was the shape they made: Cyndia left, Jaina center, Sylvanas forward-right.
findings.reason: The sentence reports Uther's internal visual priority from outside the POV.
findings.povMismatch: Sylvanas can observe his gaze move over them; she cannot know what he saw first inside his head.
findings.suggestedFix: Uther's gaze moved over them in order: Cyndia left, Jaina center, Sylvanas forward-right.

findings.line: Uther knew which question she meant.
findings.reason: The narration assigns Uther private certainty instead of staying with what Sylvanas can infer from his answer.
findings.povMismatch: Sylvanas can read his quick response; she cannot directly access his knowledge-state.
findings.suggestedFix: Uther answered the question behind it.

findings.line: The officer nearest the flap found his boots fascinating.
findings.reason: This is narrator snark, not Sylvanas's direct close-POV read.
findings.povMismatch: Sylvanas can see him avoiding the room; 'found his boots fascinating' is an authored joke laid over that behavior.
findings.suggestedFix: The officer nearest the flap kept his attention on his boots.

findings.line: That one was not common among them.
findings.reason: The sentence compresses Falric's unseen prior experience into a summary Sylvanas cannot own.
findings.povMismatch: Sylvanas can see Falric react, but she cannot authoritatively summarize the whole history of how men address Arthas to him.
findings.suggestedFix: Even Falric took a second look.

register.summary: Clipped, tactical, and exact. She notices bodies, formations, competence, and leverage first, and she does not naturally drift into other people's interiors or polished thematic captions.

audits.cleanReason: Two narration candidates were tested from scratch. 'not toward any sound ... but toward the pressure' survives as sensory precision that materially distinguishes audible noise from magical pressure; 'not to Jaina but to him' survives as concrete target precision in a power move. No fragment-pivot, source-swap, or reveal-chain negation remained in narration.

All seven tic families were counted. The chapter stays under every hard cap: 0 corner-of-mouth beats, 1 'marked', 2 tightened/eased uses, 0 facial 'shifted' uses, 4 or fewer genuine eye/gaze reaction beats once blocking and tactical scan looks are excluded, 0 weight/heaviness metaphors, and 0 performance dialogue tags.

summary.verdictReason: 17 KILL verdicts across 3 guides (12 MODERATE+, 5 MILD). Top problems: narrator-seep outside POV, geography/abstraction agency laundering, and residual filter-padding/closure captions.
